hardChecks.rule: Dashboard pages must use Main > Content structure with full-width content area and zero page content-area padding.
Layout-only Grid controls must have display caption disabled.
Every generated control must have a meaningful navigator label; default names such as Container, Grid, Text, Dynamic field, and Kanban are invalid.
Dashboard KPI numeric values must be data-bound. For flexible card display, use hidden Summary controls that save to temp variables and visible Text controls bound to those variables.
Active dashboard buttons must use the correct Button control shape, meaningful labels, and valid actions.
Generated data lists must satisfy system schema rules, include visible default fields, and include sample rows when the app is a demo/proof package.
Every lookup field must have a selected display field that resolves to the target list, normally Title. Text0 lookup display references are invalid.
